title: Health, Safety & Environmental Executive (Contract 1 Year)
description:
About The Company

We have partnered with one of the leading retail groups in Singapore with a strong presence across multiple store formats islandwide. With a portfolio of well-established brands, the business continues to grow and adapt, serving diverse customer segments though its network of over 50 outlets.

Job Summary

The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring that the company comply with health, safety, and environmental standards. This role safeguards employees, customers, and assets by implementing robust safety programs, conducting audits, and driving a culture of compliance and continuous improvement across diverse retail environments.

This role is based in Tampines.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct regular risk assessments and hazard identification for retail operations.
  • Ensure compliance with local laws, regulations, and industry standards.
  • Investigate incidents, accidents, and near misses; recommend corrective and preventive actions.
  • Oversee emergency preparedness plans, including fire drills and evacuation procedures.
  • Monitor waste management, recycling, and pollution control measures.
  • Ensure proper handling and storage of hazardous materials (fuel, cleaning chemicals, etc.).
  • Drive sustainability initiatives to reduce environmental impact.
  • Deliver HSE training programs for staff at all company premises.
  • Promote a safety-first culture through awareness campaigns and toolbox talks.
  • Ensure contractors and suppliers comply with HSE requirements.
  • Conduct regular site inspections and audits to verify compliance.
  • Maintain accurate records of incidents, inspections, and corrective actions.
  • Prepare monthly/quarterly HSE performance reports for management.
  • Work closely with Operations, HR, and Facilities teams to align safety practices.
  • Support store managers in implementing HSE standards.
  • Liaise with regulatory authorities during inspections and certifications.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Occupational Health & Safety, Environmental Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • At least 3 years of experience in HSE roles, ideally in retail industry.
  • Good knowledge of workplace safety regulations and environmental compliance.
  • Excellent communication, training, and report-writing skills.
  • Ability to travel frequently across multiple sites.

At Elevon Consulting, we specialise in connecting proven talents with forward-thinking organisations across diverse industries.

Our mid to senior management recruitment practice focuses on identifying individuals with the strategic acumen, leadership capability, and commercial foresight to drive business growth. Whether you're hiring for department heads, functional leaders, or executive roles, we deliver candidates who combine hands-on experience with the vision to shape long-term success.

Through a consultative approach, market insight, and a strong professional network, we ensure every placement aligns with your culture, goals, and operational needs — empowering businesses to build capable, future-ready leadership teams.
